comparison_surface_note: Compares official Play clientbound commands framed packet id and root-only command-tree body by splitting the generated frame and dispatching the official body bytes through Stevenarella packet_by_id.
test_topology_note: The target file and test name are this manifest's current adapter, not the universal runner topology for all oracle cases.

internal_owner.symbol_or_test_surface: packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Play, Direction::Clientbound, official packet id, official body)
internal_owner.scope_note: Current implementation witness for Play clientbound commands framed dispatch/decode; not literal/argument node payloads, redirects, custom suggestions, restricted flags, Brigadier command semantics, command context behavior, command UI behavior, runtime Play entry, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.

stop_boundary: This manifest proves Play clientbound commands packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official empty root-only command tree fixture only; it does not prove literal/argument node payloads, redirects, custom suggestions, restricted flags, Brigadier command semantics, command context behavior, command UI behavior, runtime Play entry, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
